name: Clockwork Rabbit
short_description: Tessa is employed at a textile factory as a mechanic. Solve cozy time manipulation puzzles and unravel a charming story about rabbit mechanics.
detailed_description:
Clockwork Rabbit – a relaxing puzzle game with a level editor and time manipulation

Clockwork Rabbit is a single-player, isometric puzzle game set in a steampunk world inhabited by... adorable bunnies!
Meet Tosia – a young mechanic working in a textile factory in Clockwork Town, where every room hides a new challenge.
The game blends time manipulation, action planning, helper robot programming, and a creative approach to puzzles. With no time limits on levels, you can play at your own pace and enjoy a laid-back experience.

An independent artistic production

Hand-drawn visuals inspired by the posters of Alphonse Mucha, Art Deco, and Art Nouveau styles turn every level into a small piece of art.
Theatrical, atmospheric music helps you stay focused and fully immersed in the game world.

Charming, unobtrusive storytelling

Uncover the narrative and the rich lives of the town's inhabitants – moving, surprising, and sometimes... a bit too human for rabbits.

Create your own levels!

Clockwork Rabbit includes a built-in level editor that lets you design your own puzzles and share them with the player community.
Add obstacles, program sequences, play with logic and creativity – this is a game that doesn’t end with the credits.

Who is this game for?

  • Puzzle game enthusiasts
  • Fans of clever mechanics and time-based gameplay
  • Creative players looking for a title with a level editor
  • Those who enjoy a cute visual style, heartwarming characters, and gentle storytelling
  • Players who value indie games, unique atmosphere, and passion-driven development

Key features:

  • A calm and thoughtful puzzle experience
  • Single-player adventure with narrative background
  • Isometric perspective
  • Time manipulation mechanics
  • No violence, no ads, no microtransactions
  • Stylized visuals and a unique atmosphere
  • Full-featured level editor with sharing support
  • Suitable for both experienced and new players
  • Crafted with passion by an independent team

Jump into the rabbit hole with Tosia and try to catch that bunny!

Some in-game texts were translated with the help of AI.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Spanish - Latin America, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Dutch, Finnish, Slovak, Danish
